What's new in this version: Added 3 onboarding tutorial slides (shown once on first launch) and 3 countdown screens (the 3→2→1 sequence before each round begins). The game design is now fully documented across all 36 screens.
🗺️ USER FLOW DIAGRAM
🎉 ONBOARDING — FIRST LAUNCH TUTORIAL
Shown once, on first launch only. After the loading screen, brand new users see these 3 swipeable slides before reaching Sign In. Returning users skip straight to the auth check. Store a flag in AsyncStorage: hasSeenOnboarding: true after the last slide is completed or skipped.

3 ONBOARDING SLIDES

SLIDE 1 — WELCOME
Character on floating island with speech bubble (paper hand). "WELCOME TO ROCK PAPER SCISSORS" title. "The classic game you love, now online!" Dot 1 of 3 active. Arrow (→) only — no skip yet.
DesignedFirst launch onlySwipeable
SLIDE 2 — CHALLENGE FRIENDS
Crossed swords on island + "VS" speech bubble. "CHALLENGE FRIENDS ANYWHERE" title. Room code explanation text. Dot 2 of 3 active. Both Skip (bottom-left) and Arrow (→) visible.
DesignedFirst launch onlySkip appears
SLIDE 3 — WIN & STREAK
Crown on island + "?" speech bubble. "WIN DUELS. BUILD YOUR STREAK." title. Streak explanation text. Dot 3 of 3 active. Arrow (→) navigates to Sign In/Sign Up.
DesignedFirst launch onlyLast slide → auth
SlideVisualHeadlineBody TextNavigation
1 of 3Character + paper hand speech bubbleWELCOME TO ROCK PAPER SCISSORS"The classic game you love, now online!"→ only (no skip)
2 of 3Crossed swords + VS speech bubbleCHALLENGE FRIENDS ANYWHERE"Create a room and share the code or join with a code from your friend. Start your duel instantly!"Skip + →
3 of 3Crown + ? speech bubbleWIN DUELS. BUILD YOUR STREAK."Keep winning to grow your streak and prove your skills!"Skip + → (→ goes to Sign In)
Implementation: Use a React Native FlatList with horizontal + pagingEnabled props. Track current index with useState. The dot indicators update via onScroll. Skip and the final → both call the same completeOnboarding() function that sets the AsyncStorage flag and navigates to Sign In.
🔐 AUTHENTICATION
Auth flow: New user → Sign Up → Gender Select → Home. Returning user → Sign In → Home (skips gender + onboarding). After any successful auth, save the JWT to AsyncStorage so the loading screen can bypass auth on future opens.

SIGN IN / SIGN UP

SIGN IN
Username + password fields. SIGN IN button. Google sign-in (v2). "Create Account" link navigates to Sign Up.
DesignedShip as-is
SIGN UP
Username + password fields. SIGN UP button. "Already have an account? Sign In" link. Mirrors sign in for consistency.
DesignedShip as-is
🧑 GENDER SELECTION

3 STATES — DEFAULT · MALE · FEMALE

DEFAULT
Both characters equal height, neither highlighted. "*Click on it" instruction. Arrow (→) not yet shown.
DesignedNo selection
MALE SELECTED
Male character elevated with crown + gold stars. Female dims. Arrow (→) appears top-right to proceed.
DesignedActive
FEMALE SELECTED
Female character elevated with crown + gold stars. Male dims. Arrow (→) appears to proceed.
DesignedActive
🏠 HOME SCREEN
HOME SCREEN
Character on floating grass island. ROCK PAPER SCISSORS title. PLAY VS BOT (yellow) + PLAY VS FRIEND (white) buttons. User avatar + name + score top-left. Gear icon top-right.
DesignedShip as-isHub screen
⚔️ GAMEPLAY SCREENS

MODE SELECT

MODE SELECT
BEST OF 3 and BEST OF 5 yellow buttons. Appears after tapping PLAY VS BOT on home screen.
DesignedPerfect as-is

GAME SCREEN — 3 STATES

SHOOT STATE
Both hands fist-down. "SHOOT" text center. 3 move buttons. Score circles on sides. Waiting for the player to tap a move.
DesignedInput waiting
REVEAL STATE
Both chosen moves shown (e.g. scissors vs paper). Score circles update. Brief moment before round flash overlay.
DesignedPost-choice
ROUND RESULT FLASH
Yellow pixel overlay: "ROUND RESULT" + "ONE POINT TO YOU". Auto-dismisses after ~1.5s. Not a screen — a timed View overlay using Reanimated.
DesignedOverlayAuto-dismiss
⏱️ COUNTDOWN — 3 → 2 → 1
What is this? Before the player can tap a move each round, a large animated number counts down on the green arena background. This builds anticipation and gives both players (in VS Friend mode) a synchronized moment to think. Each number shows for ~0.8 seconds. After "1" disappears, "SHOOT" appears and the move buttons become tappable.
3
First number
2
Second number
1
Then SHOOT!
Implementation — Reanimated 3:

Use withSequence + withTiming to animate the number scaling from 0.5 → 1.2 → 1.0 on each tick. Run a JS setInterval or setTimeout chain that updates a useState(3) counter every 800ms. When counter hits 0: hide countdown, show "SHOOT", enable the 3 move buttons. In VS Friend mode, the countdown starts when the server sends the match:start socket event to both clients simultaneously — this keeps both players in sync.
StateNumber shownColorDurationMove buttonsSound
Countdown 33 (gold/orange)Orange~0.8sDisabledLow beep
Countdown 22 (gold)Gold/Yellow~0.8sDisabledMid beep
Countdown 11 (gold/green)Gold/Green~0.8sDisabledHigh beep
SHOOT"SHOOT" textWhiteUntil move chosenEnabledGo SFX
🌐 ONLINE DUEL — ALL 8 STATES
Flow: Entry → Create Room (host) OR Join Room (guest) → both land on Room Ready screen → host taps START MATCH → Entering Match overlay → Countdown → Game Screen.

ENTRY + HOST FLOW

ENTRY
CREATE ROOM (yellow) or JOIN ROOM (blue) with dashed "OR" divider.
DesignedDecision
CREATE ROOM
Room code in large box. COPY + SHARE buttons. "Waiting for player..." status.
DesignedHost waiting
HOSTED ROOM
"ROOM READY!" banner. Both player cards shown. "You are the host." START MATCH (blue).
DesignedBoth joined

GUEST FLOW

JOIN ROOM
Text input for room code. JOIN button (blue). Simple one-field screen.
DesignedGuest entry
JOINING ROOM
Dark loading state. "JOINING ROOM..." in yellow panel. WebSocket connecting.
DesignedLoading
JOINED ROOM
"ROOM READY!" banner. "Waiting for host to start..." LEAVE ROOM (red) instead of start button.
DesignedGuest view
ENTERING MATCH
"GET READY!" + "ENTERING MATCH..." overlay. Both players see simultaneously. Leads to countdown.
DesignedTransition
🏆 RESULT SCREENS

VICTORY

VICTORY
"VICTORY" in gold. Score + Streak boxes. SHARE button. Crown character on gold pedestal with flying stars.
DesignedShip as-is
POST VICTORY
REMATCH + HOME buttons. Same crown character. Clean action screen.
DesignedShip as-is
SHARE SCREEN
Phone mockup preview image for native share sheet. Generated and shared via expo-sharing.
DesignedShare image

DEFEAT

DEFEAT
"DEFEAT" in red. Score + Streak boxes. SHARE button. Sad character with jester hat + balloons on stone pedestal.
DesignedShip as-is
POST DEFEAT
REMATCH + HOME buttons. Same jester character. Mirrors post-victory for code reuse.
DesignedShip as-is
⚙️ SETTINGS & PAUSE MENU

SETTINGS — VIEW & EDIT

SETTINGS — VIEW
Username (read-only). Gender toggle. Sound + Music sliders. LOG OUT red button. Pencil edit icon top-right.
DesignedDefault state
SETTINGS — EDIT
Pencil glows gold. Background dims. Username field becomes editable with cursor. Allows in-place username editing.
DesignedEdit state

PAUSE MENU — 2 STATES

PAUSED — SOUND ON
"PAUSED" title. RESUME · RESTART · SOUND: ON (green) · QUIT MATCH (red). Accessed via gear icon in-game.
DesignedIn-game pause
PAUSED — SOUND OFF
"SOUND: OFF" in red. Toggle between states without closing the pause menu.
DesignedToggle state
⚠️ ERROR & SYSTEM SCREENS
Build these before shipping. All 4 screens are fully designed and ready to implement. The No Internet + Oops screens cover ~95% of all error scenarios via reuse.
NO INTERNET
WiFi with prohibition sign. "NO INTERNET" + "PLEASE CHECK YOUR CONNECTION AND TRY AGAIN." RETRY + HOME buttons.
CriticalDesigned
OOPS / SERVER ERROR
Warning triangle. "OOPS!" + "SOMETHING WENT WRONG, PLEASE TRY AGAIN." OK button. Catch-all for 500 errors.
CriticalDesigned
QUIT CONFIRM
"EXIT GAME?" red header. "ARE YOU SURE YOU WANT TO EXIT?" YES, EXIT (red) + CANCEL (yellow).
CriticalDesigned

FOUNDATION — AUTH + ONBOARDING Weeks 1–2
TaskScreensDays

Backend: POST /auth/signup + /signin, bcrypt, JWT, Postgres User table—3
Gender select (3 states), save to backend + AsyncStorage, skip on returnGender Select ×31

TaskScreensDays
Home screen, mode selectHome, Mode Select1.5

Save match result: POST /matches—1

TaskScreensDays
